enriched_points.expanded_content: Technological breakthroughs in genetic engineering and AI are accelerating human enhancement, enabling innovations like cognitive enhancers and bionic limbs.
Enhancements include cognitive drugs, genetic modifications, and physical augmentations, showcasing a variety of approaches to improving human capabilities.
There is increasing public curiosity and discourse surrounding human enhancement technologies, reflecting societal fascination with their potential benefits and ethical implications.
